title: Use of multiple agreements
doc_html:
§969.24.  Use of multiple agreements

An extender of credit shall not divide a consumer loan into multiple agreements for the purpose of obtaining a higher loan finance charge than would otherwise be permitted.

Acts 1999, No. 794, §1, eff. July 2, 1999.
